name: CLX - MGA Insurance Review Scheduler v1

nodes.name: Schedule Trigger (DEACTIVATED)
nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED. Daily 05:00 UTC. For each in-force policy_application: schedules annual review (12 months since last_review_date), renewal review (60 days before renewal_date), and compliance audit (random ~10% per quarter). Inserts policy_reviews rows with type/due_date/priority. Triggers B7.1 video generator for each new annual or renewal review.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ vertical_id: 'insurance', policy_application_id: $json.policy_application_id, client_id: $json.client_id, advisor_id: $json.advisor_id, review_type: $json.review_type, trigger_source: $json.trigger_source, trigger_signal_type: $json.trigger_signal_type, scheduled_date: new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10), due_date: $json.due_date, priority: $json.priority, status: 'scheduled', video_engagement_status: 'not_sent' }) }}

={{ (() => { const ins = $input.item.json; const row = Array.isArray(ins) ? ins[0] : ins; const want = $('Per Review').item.json.want_video; if (!want || !row || !row.id) return JSON.stringify({ skip: true }); return JSON.stringify({ internal_secret: $env.INTERNAL_EMAIL_SECRET, policy_review_id: row.id }); })() }}

nodes.name: Trigger Video Gen
nodes.notes: Fires B7.1 video generator if review type wants a video (annual + renewal). compliance_audit reviews skip video. The downstream workflow no-ops on { skip: true } body.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ (() => { const ins = $('Insert Review').item.json; const row = Array.isArray(ins) ? ins[0] : ins; const ctx = $('Per Review').item.json; return JSON.stringify({ vertical_id: 'insurance', event_type: 'review_scheduled', client_id: ctx.client_id, advisor_id: ctx.advisor_id, policy_application_id: ctx.policy_application_id, performed_by_user_id: null, performed_by_role: 'agent', event_data: { policy_review_id: row && row.id, review_type: ctx.review_type, due_date: ctx.due_date, priority: ctx.priority, trigger_signal_type: ctx.trigger_signal_type }, occurred_at: new Date().toISOString() }); })() }}
